guides.title: Pre-Filing Readiness Checklist — Avoiding a Refuse-to-Receive (RTR) decision on your ANDA
guides.description: A practical pre-submission checklist to catch the completeness and formatting gaps that most often trigger a Refuse-to-Receive decision.

guides.title: Form FDA 356h: Facility-Readiness Prevention Guide
guides.description: Getting establishment and facility information right the first time, so 356h details don't become an avoidable deficiency.

guides.title: Common Bioequivalence Study-Design Deficiencies — Quick Reference
guides.description: A quick reference for spotting and avoiding the first-cycle bioequivalence study-design deficiencies that delay approval.

guides.title: CTD Module 3 Completeness Self-Audit
guides.description: A section-by-section CMC dossier self-check to confirm Module 3 completeness before you submit.
